content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Harmon Retail Group
Customer ID: C005
Contract ID: K005
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H1 2023 (January – June 2023)
Meeting Date: July 11, 2023
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Sandra Harmon (COO), Darius Moore (Regional Manager West)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Harmon Retail opened 2 new store locations in Q1 2023, bringing their total to 22 stores. Revenue for H1 was up 8% year over year, driven primarily by their West Coast locations. Sandra Harmon noted they are targeting 3 additional openings in H2.

PLATFORM USAGE
DataSync Pro was launched in November 2023 and H1 2023 represents pre-launch period. This QBR was held proactively to align on onboarding readiness ahead of the November go-live date. Platform is not yet live.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- Sandra Harmon confirmed the primary use case: standardizing operational procedures and inventory documentation across all 22 store locations
- Mobile app capability was discussed as a critical requirement — store managers work on the floor and need mobile access
- James Okafor walked through the onboarding timeline: IT configuration in September, manager training in October, go-live in November
- Data migration from the legacy SharePoint environment will be handled by Harmon's IT team with support from our implementation team

ACTION ITEMS
- James Okafor to provide onboarding project plan by July 25
- Harmon IT team to complete SSO configuration by September 30
- Manager training sessions to be scheduled for October — Darius Moore to coordinate with store managers

NEXT QBR: January 2024
